---
title: "CCP_generation_Modul_6_LSA_actual"
format: html
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: true
  message: true
---

# Intro: # MODUL 6 — Actual Latent Semantic Analysis

This document constructs the fixed L1-Corpus semantic reference space, folds the prepared target segments into that space without refitting it, and calculates the x3 and x4 semantic-similarity measures.

The document reads only frozen inputs. It does not reconstruct the L1 corpus, rerun UDPipe, reread the raw target texts, relocate headings, or rebuild the validated sentence and paragraph structure.


#

```{r}
# MODUL 6.23 — Set up the numerical LSA workflow

# 1. Validate the required packages

required_packages <- c(
  "dplyr",
  "tidyr",
  "purrr",
  "readr",
  "stringr",
  "tibble",
  "quanteda",
  "Matrix",
  "irlba"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[
  !vapply(
    required_packages,
    requireNamespace,
    logical(1),
    quietly = TRUE
  )
]

if (length(missing_packages) > 0L) {
  stop(
    "Missing required packages: ",
    paste(
      missing_packages,
      collapse = ", "
    ),
    ". Install them before running MODUL 6."
  )
}

# 2. Attach the required packages

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(quanteda)
library(Matrix)
library(irlba)

# 3. Set general options

options(
  dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE,
  scipen = 999
)

# 4. Define the fixed LSA configuration

lsa_dimensions <- 50L

lsa_pos_keep <- c(
  "NOUN",
  "PROPN",
  "VERB",
  "ADJ",
  "ADV",
  "CCONJ",
  "SCONJ"
)

lsa_tf_method <- "log1p"

lsa_idf_method <- "log_N_over_df"

lsa_random_seed <- 20260714L

# 5. Validate the fixed configuration

if (
  lsa_dimensions != 50L ||
  length(lsa_pos_keep) != 7L ||
  anyDuplicated(lsa_pos_keep) > 0L
) {
  stop(
    "The fixed MODUL 6 LSA configuration is invalid."
  )
}

# 6. Display the active configuration

lsa_configuration <- tibble::tibble(
  parameter = c(
    "Dimensions",
    "TF weighting",
    "IDF weighting",
    "Included UPOS categories",
    "SVD random seed"
  ),

  value = c(
    as.character(lsa_dimensions),
    "log(1 + tf)",
    "log(N / df)",
    paste(
      lsa_pos_keep,
      collapse = ", "
    ),
    as.character(lsa_random_seed)
  )
)

print(
  lsa_configuration,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)

message(
  "MODUL 6 actual LSA setup complete."
)
```
# MODUL 6.24 — Register and validate frozen paths

```{r}

# MODUL 6.24 — Register and validate frozen paths

project_root <- normalizePath(
  "..",
  winslash = "/",
  mustWork = TRUE
)

actual_lsa_input_paths <- c(
  l1_reference_bundle = file.path(
    project_root,
    "data_prep_CCP_output",
    "l1_corpus_reference_bundle_corrected.rds"
  ),
  target_input_bundle = file.path(
    project_root,
    "CCP_generation_pipeL",
    "M6_prep_outputs",
    "modul_6_LSA_inputs.rds"
  )
)

actual_lsa_output_dir <- file.path(
  project_root,
  "measure_outputs"
)

dir.create(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE
)

missing_inputs <- actual_lsa_input_paths[
  !file.exists(actual_lsa_input_paths)
]

if (length(missing_inputs) > 0L) {
  stop(
    "Missing frozen input files: ",
    paste(
      names(missing_inputs),
      collapse = ", "
    )
  )
}

actual_lsa_path_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  input = names(actual_lsa_input_paths),
  path = unname(actual_lsa_input_paths),
  exists = file.exists(actual_lsa_input_paths)
)

print(
  actual_lsa_path_audit,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)

message(
  "Frozen actual LSA paths validated successfully."
)
```

# # MODUL 6.25 — Load the frozen L1 and target bundles

```{r}
# MODUL 6.25 — Load the frozen L1 and target bundles

l1_reference_bundle <- readRDS(
  actual_lsa_input_paths[["l1_reference_bundle"]]
)

target_input_bundle <- readRDS(
  actual_lsa_input_paths[["target_input_bundle"]]
)

required_l1_objects <- c(
  "documents",
  "sentences",
  "tokens",
  "metadata"
)

required_target_objects <- c(
  "sentence_segment_table",
  "paragraph_segment_table",
  "whole_body_text_segment_table",
  "shared_prompt_headings",
  "introduced_subheadings",
  "paragraph_section_map",
  "structural_audit",
  "sentence_mapping_audit"
)

missing_l1_objects <- setdiff(
  required_l1_objects,
  names(l1_reference_bundle)
)

missing_target_objects <- setdiff(
  required_target_objects,
  names(target_input_bundle)
)

if (length(missing_l1_objects) > 0L) {
  stop(
    "Missing L1 bundle objects: ",
    paste(missing_l1_objects, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

if (length(missing_target_objects) > 0L) {
  stop(
    "Missing target bundle objects: ",
    paste(missing_target_objects, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

if (!isTRUE(
  l1_reference_bundle$metadata$final_audit_passed
)) {
  stop(
    "The frozen L1 reference bundle did not pass its final audit."
  )
}

bundle_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  bundle = c(
    "L1 reference bundle",
    "Target preparation bundle"
  ),
  n_objects = c(
    length(l1_reference_bundle),
    length(target_input_bundle)
  ),
  valid = TRUE
)

print(
  bundle_audit,
  n = Inf
)

message(
  "Frozen L1 and target bundles loaded successfully."
)
```
# MODUL 6.26 — Extract and validate the required objects

```{r}


# MODUL 6.26 — Extract and validate the required objects

# Extract the frozen L1 objects

l1_documents <- l1_reference_bundle$documents
l1_sentences <- l1_reference_bundle$sentences
l1_tokens <- l1_reference_bundle$tokens
l1_metadata <- l1_reference_bundle$metadata

# Extract the frozen target objects

sentence_segment_table <-
  target_input_bundle$sentence_segment_table

paragraph_segment_table <-
  target_input_bundle$paragraph_segment_table

whole_body_text_segment_table <-
  target_input_bundle$whole_body_text_segment_table

shared_prompt_headings <-
  target_input_bundle$shared_prompt_headings

introduced_subheadings <-
  target_input_bundle$introduced_subheadings

paragraph_section_map <-
  target_input_bundle$paragraph_section_map

structural_audit <-
  target_input_bundle$structural_audit

sentence_mapping_audit <-
  target_input_bundle$sentence_mapping_audit

# Validate the frozen inputs

stopifnot(
  isTRUE(l1_metadata$final_audit_passed),
  nrow(l1_documents) == 2004L,
  nrow(l1_sentences) == 5252L,
  nrow(l1_tokens) == 108519L,
  nrow(sentence_segment_table) == 106L,
  nrow(paragraph_segment_table) == 15L,
  nrow(whole_body_text_segment_table) == 4L
)

# Display the validated inventory

frozen_object_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  object = c(
    "L1 documents",
    "L1 source sentences",
    "L1 parsed tokens",
    "Target sentence segments",
    "Target paragraph segments",
    "Target whole-body-text segments",
    "Shared prompt headings",
    "Paragraph-section mappings"
  ),
  n_rows = c(
    nrow(l1_documents),
    nrow(l1_sentences),
    nrow(l1_tokens),
    nrow(sentence_segment_table),
    nrow(paragraph_segment_table),
    nrow(whole_body_text_segment_table),
    nrow(shared_prompt_headings),
    nrow(paragraph_section_map)
  )
)

print(
  frozen_object_audit,
  n = Inf
)

message(
  "Frozen actual LSA objects extracted and validated successfully."
)
```

# MODUL 6.27 — Prepare the selected L1 token layer

```{r}

# MODUL 6.27 — Prepare the selected L1 token layer

required_token_columns <- c(
  "document_uid",
  "sentence_uid",
  "token_uid",
  "lemma",
  "lemma_clean",
  "pos",
  "lsa_selected_final"
)

missing_token_columns <- setdiff(
  required_token_columns,
  names(l1_tokens)
)

if (length(missing_token_columns) > 0L) {
  stop(
    "Missing required token columns: ",
    paste(missing_token_columns, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

clean_lsa_term <- function(x) {
  x |>
    as.character() |>
    stringr::str_squish() |>
    stringr::str_to_lower() |>
    dplyr::na_if("") |>
    dplyr::na_if("_")
}

l1_lsa_tokens <- l1_tokens |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    token_order = dplyr::row_number(),

    lemma_primary = clean_lsa_term(
      lemma
    ),

    lemma_fallback = clean_lsa_term(
      lemma_clean
    ),

    lsa_term = dplyr::coalesce(
      lemma_primary,
      lemma_fallback
    ),

    lsa_pos = stringr::str_to_upper(
      as.character(pos)
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(
    lsa_selected_final
  )

missing_lsa_terms <- l1_lsa_tokens |>
  dplyr::filter(
    is.na(lsa_term)
  )

if (nrow(missing_lsa_terms) > 0L) {
  print(
    missing_lsa_terms |>
      dplyr::select(
        document_uid,
        sentence_uid,
        token_uid,
        lemma,
        lemma_clean,
        pos
      ),
    n = Inf
  )

  stop(
    nrow(missing_lsa_terms),
    " selected tokens still lack a usable lemma."
  )
}

l1_lsa_tokens <- l1_lsa_tokens |>
  dplyr::select(
    document_uid,
    sentence_uid,
    token_uid,
    token_order,
    lsa_term,
    lsa_pos
  )

stopifnot(
  nrow(l1_lsa_tokens) == 56289L,
  dplyr::n_distinct(
    l1_lsa_tokens$document_uid
  ) == 2004L,
  all(
    l1_lsa_tokens$lsa_pos %in%
      lsa_pos_keep
  ),
  !anyDuplicated(
    l1_lsa_tokens$token_uid
  )
)

l1_lsa_token_audit <- l1_lsa_tokens |>
  dplyr::count(
    lsa_pos,
    name = "n_tokens"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(
    match(
      lsa_pos,
      lsa_pos_keep
    )
  )

print(
  l1_lsa_token_audit,
  n = Inf
)

message(
  "Selected L1 token layer prepared: ",
  format(
    nrow(l1_lsa_tokens),
    big.mark = ","
  ),
  " tokens across ",
  format(
    dplyr::n_distinct(
      l1_lsa_tokens$document_uid
    ),
    big.mark = ","
  ),
  " documents."
)
 

  
    
      

```


```{r}
# MODUL 6.27 — Prepare and freeze the selected L1 token layer

l1_lsa_token_bundle_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_l1_token_layer.rds"
)

if (file.exists(l1_lsa_token_bundle_path)) {

  # Load the previously frozen layer

  l1_lsa_token_bundle <- readRDS(
    l1_lsa_token_bundle_path
  )

  l1_lsa_tokens <-
    l1_lsa_token_bundle$l1_lsa_tokens

  excluded_lsa_tokens <-
    l1_lsa_token_bundle$excluded_lsa_tokens

  l1_lsa_token_audit <-
    l1_lsa_token_bundle$l1_lsa_token_audit

  message(
    "Saved actual-LSA L1 token layer loaded."
  )

} else {

  # Validate the required source columns

  required_token_columns <- c(
    "document_uid",
    "sentence_uid",
    "token_uid",
    "lemma",
    "lemma_clean",
    "pos",
    "lsa_selected_final"
  )

  missing_token_columns <- setdiff(
    required_token_columns,
    names(l1_tokens)
  )

  if (length(missing_token_columns) > 0L) {
    stop(
      "Missing required token columns: ",
      paste(missing_token_columns, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }

  # Clean and select the frozen LSA tokens

  clean_lsa_term <- function(x) {
    x |>
      as.character() |>
      stringr::str_squish() |>
      stringr::str_to_lower() |>
      dplyr::na_if("") |>
      dplyr::na_if("_")
  }

  l1_lsa_tokens_selected <- l1_tokens |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      token_order = dplyr::row_number(),

      lsa_term = dplyr::coalesce(
        clean_lsa_term(lemma),
        clean_lsa_term(lemma_clean)
      ),

      lsa_pos = stringr::str_to_upper(
        stringr::str_squish(
          as.character(pos)
        )
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(
      lsa_selected_final
    )

  # Preserve but exclude two selected tokens without usable lemmas

  excluded_lsa_tokens <- l1_lsa_tokens_selected |>
    dplyr::filter(
      is.na(lsa_term)
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      document_uid,
      sentence_uid,
      token_uid,
      lemma,
      lemma_clean,
      lsa_pos
    )

  l1_lsa_tokens <- l1_lsa_tokens_selected |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(lsa_term)
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      document_uid,
      sentence_uid,
      token_uid,
      token_order,
      lsa_term,
      lsa_pos
    )

  # Validate the final layer

  stopifnot(
    nrow(l1_lsa_tokens_selected) == 56289L,
    nrow(excluded_lsa_tokens) == 2L,
    nrow(l1_lsa_tokens) == 56287L,
    dplyr::n_distinct(
      l1_lsa_tokens$document_uid
    ) == 2004L,
    all(
      l1_lsa_tokens$lsa_pos %in%
        lsa_pos_keep
    ),
    !anyDuplicated(
      l1_lsa_tokens$token_uid
    )
  )

  # Create a compact audit

  l1_lsa_token_audit <- l1_lsa_tokens |>
    dplyr::count(
      lsa_pos,
      name = "n_tokens"
    )

  # Freeze the reusable layer

  l1_lsa_token_bundle <- list(
    l1_lsa_tokens = l1_lsa_tokens,
    excluded_lsa_tokens = excluded_lsa_tokens,
    l1_lsa_token_audit = l1_lsa_token_audit,
    metadata = list(
      n_selected = 56289L,
      n_excluded = 2L,
      n_usable = 56287L,
      n_documents = 2004L,
      lsa_pos_keep = lsa_pos_keep
    )
  )

  saveRDS(
    l1_lsa_token_bundle,
    l1_lsa_token_bundle_path
  )

  message(
    "Actual-LSA L1 token layer prepared and frozen."
  )
}

print(
  l1_lsa_token_audit,
  n = Inf
)

message(
  "Usable actual-LSA tokens: ",
  format(nrow(l1_lsa_tokens), big.mark = ","),
  " across ",
  dplyr::n_distinct(l1_lsa_tokens$document_uid),
  " documents."
)
```
# MODUL 6.28 — Construct and freeze L1 document term sequences

```{r}

# MODUL 6.28 — Construct and freeze L1 document term sequences

l1_document_terms_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_l1_document_terms.rds"
)

if (file.exists(l1_document_terms_path)) {

  l1_document_terms <- readRDS(
    l1_document_terms_path
  )

  message(
    "Saved L1 document term sequences loaded."
  )

} else {

  l1_document_terms <- l1_lsa_tokens |>
    dplyr::arrange(
      document_uid,
      token_order
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      document_uid
    ) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      lsa_text = stringr::str_c(
        lsa_term,
        collapse = " "
      ),
      n_lsa_tokens = dplyr::n(),
      n_lsa_types = dplyr::n_distinct(
        lsa_term
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  stopifnot(
    nrow(l1_document_terms) == 2004L,
    sum(l1_document_terms$n_lsa_tokens) == 56287L,
    !anyDuplicated(
      l1_document_terms$document_uid
    ),
    all(
      !is.na(l1_document_terms$lsa_text) &
        l1_document_terms$lsa_text != ""
    )
  )

  saveRDS(
    l1_document_terms,
    l1_document_terms_path
  )

  message(
    "L1 document term sequences constructed and frozen."
  )
}

stopifnot(
  nrow(l1_document_terms) == 2004L,
  sum(l1_document_terms$n_lsa_tokens) == 56287L
)

print(
  l1_document_terms |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_documents = dplyr::n(),
      n_tokens = sum(n_lsa_tokens),
      median_tokens = stats::median(
        n_lsa_tokens
      ),
      min_tokens = min(
        n_lsa_tokens
      ),
      max_tokens = max(
        n_lsa_tokens
      )
    )
)
```
# # MODUL 6.29 — Build and freeze the L1 document-feature matrix

```{r}
# MODUL 6.29 — Build and freeze the L1 document-feature matrix

l1_dfm_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_l1_dfm.rds"
)

if (file.exists(l1_dfm_path)) {

  l1_dfm <- readRDS(
    l1_dfm_path
  )

  message(
    "Saved L1 document-feature matrix loaded."
  )

} else {

  l1_tokens_quanteda <- quanteda::tokens(
    l1_document_terms$lsa_text,
    what = "fastestword"
  )

  quanteda::docnames(
    l1_tokens_quanteda
  ) <- l1_document_terms$document_uid

  l1_dfm <- quanteda::dfm(
    l1_tokens_quanteda
  )

  stopifnot(
    quanteda::ndoc(l1_dfm) == 2004L,
    sum(l1_dfm) == 56287L,
    quanteda::nfeat(l1_dfm) > lsa_dimensions,
    identical(
      quanteda::docnames(l1_dfm),
      l1_document_terms$document_uid
    )
  )

  saveRDS(
    l1_dfm,
    l1_dfm_path
  )

  message(
    "L1 document-feature matrix built and frozen."
  )
}

l1_dfm_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  n_documents = quanteda::ndoc(l1_dfm),
  n_features = quanteda::nfeat(l1_dfm),
  n_tokens = sum(l1_dfm),
  sparsity = quanteda::sparsity(l1_dfm)
)

print(
  l1_dfm_audit,
  n = Inf
)
```
# MODUL 6.30 — Calculate and freeze L1 document frequencies and IDF

```{r}

# MODUL 6.30 — Calculate and freeze L1 document frequencies and IDF

l1_idf_bundle_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_l1_idf.rds"
)

if (file.exists(l1_idf_bundle_path)) {

  l1_idf_bundle <- readRDS(
    l1_idf_bundle_path
  )

  l1_vocabulary <- l1_idf_bundle$vocabulary
  l1_document_frequency <- l1_idf_bundle$document_frequency
  l1_idf <- l1_idf_bundle$idf

  message(
    "Saved L1 vocabulary and IDF loaded."
  )

} else {

  n_l1_documents <- quanteda::ndoc(
    l1_dfm
  )

  l1_vocabulary <- quanteda::featnames(
    l1_dfm
  )

  l1_document_frequency <- as.numeric(
    Matrix::colSums(
      l1_dfm > 0
    )
  )

  names(l1_document_frequency) <-
    l1_vocabulary

  l1_idf <- log(
    n_l1_documents /
      l1_document_frequency
  )

  names(l1_idf) <- l1_vocabulary

  stopifnot(
    length(l1_vocabulary) == 9109L,
    length(l1_document_frequency) == 9109L,
    length(l1_idf) == 9109L,
    all(l1_document_frequency >= 1L),
    all(l1_document_frequency <= n_l1_documents),
    all(is.finite(l1_idf)),
    all(l1_idf >= 0),
    identical(
      names(l1_idf),
      l1_vocabulary
    )
  )

  l1_idf_bundle <- list(
    vocabulary = l1_vocabulary,
    document_frequency = l1_document_frequency,
    idf = l1_idf,
    n_documents = n_l1_documents,
    formula = "log(N / df)"
  )

  saveRDS(
    l1_idf_bundle,
    l1_idf_bundle_path
  )

  message(
    "L1 vocabulary and IDF calculated and frozen."
  )
}

l1_idf_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  n_documents = l1_idf_bundle$n_documents,
  n_features = length(l1_vocabulary),
  min_df = min(l1_document_frequency),
  max_df = max(l1_document_frequency),
  min_idf = min(l1_idf),
  median_idf = stats::median(l1_idf),
  max_idf = max(l1_idf)
)

print(
  l1_idf_audit,
  n = Inf
)
n_single_document_features = sum(
  l1_document_frequency == 1L
)
```


```{r}
tibble::tibble(n_single_document_features = sum(l1_document_frequency == 1L), proportion_single_document_features = mean(l1_document_frequency == 1L))
```

# MODUL 6.31 — Apply and freeze log-TF–IDF weighting

```{r}

# MODUL 6.31 — Apply and freeze log-TF–IDF weighting

l1_tfidf_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_l1_tfidf.rds"
)

if (file.exists(l1_tfidf_path)) {

  l1_tfidf_matrix <- readRDS(
    l1_tfidf_path
  )

  message(
    "Saved L1 log-TF–IDF matrix loaded."
  )

} else {

  # Convert the DFM to a sparse numeric matrix

  l1_count_matrix <- methods::as(
    l1_dfm,
    "dgCMatrix"
  )

  # Validate vocabulary alignment

  stopifnot(
    identical(
      colnames(l1_count_matrix),
      l1_vocabulary
    ),
    identical(
      names(l1_idf),
      l1_vocabulary
    )
  )

  # Apply TF = log(1 + tf) to nonzero entries

  l1_log_tf_matrix <- l1_count_matrix
  l1_log_tf_matrix@x <- log1p(
    l1_log_tf_matrix@x
  )

  # Apply IDF = log(N / df)

  l1_tfidf_matrix <- l1_log_tf_matrix %*%
    Matrix::Diagonal(
      x = as.numeric(l1_idf)
    )

  colnames(l1_tfidf_matrix) <- l1_vocabulary
  rownames(l1_tfidf_matrix) <- quanteda::docnames(
    l1_dfm
  )

  # Validate the weighted matrix

  l1_tfidf_row_norms <- sqrt(
    Matrix::rowSums(
      l1_tfidf_matrix ^ 2
    )
  )

  stopifnot(
    all(
      dim(l1_tfidf_matrix) ==
        c(2004L, 9109L)
    ),
    all(is.finite(l1_tfidf_matrix@x)),
    all(l1_tfidf_matrix@x > 0),
    all(l1_tfidf_row_norms > 0)
  )

  saveRDS(
    l1_tfidf_matrix,
    l1_tfidf_path
  )

  message(
    "L1 log-TF–IDF matrix calculated and frozen."
  )
}

# Audit the weighted matrix

l1_tfidf_row_norms <- sqrt(
  Matrix::rowSums(
    l1_tfidf_matrix ^ 2
  )
)

l1_tfidf_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  n_documents = nrow(l1_tfidf_matrix),
  n_features = ncol(l1_tfidf_matrix),
  n_nonzero = length(l1_tfidf_matrix@x),
  min_row_norm = min(l1_tfidf_row_norms),
  median_row_norm = stats::median(
    l1_tfidf_row_norms
  ),
  max_row_norm = max(l1_tfidf_row_norms),
  n_zero_rows = sum(
    l1_tfidf_row_norms == 0
  )
)

print(
  l1_tfidf_audit,
  n = Inf
)
```

# MODUL 6.32 — Fit and freeze the fixed 50-dimensional SVD

```{r}
# MODUL 6.32 — Fit and freeze the fixed 50-dimensional SVD

l1_svd_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_svd.rds"
)

if (file.exists(l1_svd_path)) {

  l1_svd <- readRDS(
    l1_svd_path
  )

  message(
    "Saved 50-dimensional LSA decomposition loaded."
  )

} else {

  stopifnot(
    lsa_dimensions == 50L,
    lsa_dimensions < min(
      dim(l1_tfidf_matrix)
    )
  )

  set.seed(
    lsa_random_seed
  )

  l1_svd <- irlba::irlba(
    l1_tfidf_matrix,
    nv = lsa_dimensions,
    nu = lsa_dimensions
  )

  stopifnot(
    ncol(l1_svd$u) == 50L,
    length(l1_svd$d) == 50L,
    ncol(l1_svd$v) == 50L,
    all(is.finite(l1_svd$d)),
    all(l1_svd$d > 0)
  )

  saveRDS(
    l1_svd,
    l1_svd_path
  )

  message(
    "Fixed 50-dimensional LSA decomposition fitted and frozen."
  )
}

lsa_retained_energy <- sum(
  l1_svd$d ^ 2
) / sum(
  l1_tfidf_matrix@x ^ 2
)

l1_svd_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  n_documents = nrow(l1_svd$u),
  n_features = nrow(l1_svd$v),
  n_dimensions = length(l1_svd$d),
  largest_singular_value = max(l1_svd$d),
  smallest_retained_singular_value = min(l1_svd$d),
  retained_matrix_energy = lsa_retained_energy
)

print(
  l1_svd_audit,
  n = Inf
)
```
# MODUL 6.33  loads the frozen LSA reference space. It does not reconstruct these target segments.

```{r}
# MODUL 6.33 — Freeze and validate the LSA reference space

lsa_reference_space_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_reference_space.rds"
)

if (file.exists(lsa_reference_space_path)) {

  lsa_reference_space <- readRDS(
    lsa_reference_space_path
  )

  message(
    "Saved actual-LSA reference space loaded."
  )

} else {

  dimension_names <- sprintf(
    "dim_%02d",
    seq_len(lsa_dimensions)
  )

  right_singular_vectors <- l1_svd$v
  rownames(right_singular_vectors) <- l1_vocabulary
  colnames(right_singular_vectors) <- dimension_names

  reference_document_vectors <- l1_svd$u
  rownames(reference_document_vectors) <- rownames(
    l1_tfidf_matrix
  )
  colnames(reference_document_vectors) <- dimension_names

  singular_values <- l1_svd$d
  names(singular_values) <- dimension_names

  stopifnot(
    identical(
      rownames(right_singular_vectors),
      l1_vocabulary
    ),
    identical(
      names(l1_idf),
      l1_vocabulary
    ),
    nrow(right_singular_vectors) == 9109L,
    ncol(right_singular_vectors) == 50L,
    nrow(reference_document_vectors) == 2004L,
    ncol(reference_document_vectors) == 50L,
    all(singular_values > 0)
  )

  lsa_reference_space <- list(
    vocabulary = l1_vocabulary,
    document_frequency = l1_document_frequency,
    idf = l1_idf,
    singular_values = singular_values,
    right_singular_vectors = right_singular_vectors,
    reference_document_vectors = reference_document_vectors,

    configuration = list(
      dimensions = lsa_dimensions,
      tf_weighting = "log(1 + tf)",
      idf_weighting = "log(N / df)",
      fold_in = "weighted_segment %*% V %*% D^-1",
      lsa_pos_keep = lsa_pos_keep,
      random_seed = lsa_random_seed
    ),

    audit = l1_svd_audit
  )

  saveRDS(
    lsa_reference_space,
    lsa_reference_space_path
  )

  message(
    "Actual-LSA reference space frozen successfully."
  )
}

stopifnot(
  length(lsa_reference_space$vocabulary) == 9109L,
  length(lsa_reference_space$idf) == 9109L,
  length(lsa_reference_space$singular_values) == 50L,
  all(
    dim(
      lsa_reference_space$right_singular_vectors
    ) == c(9109L, 50L)
  )
)

tibble::tibble(
  n_documents = nrow(
    lsa_reference_space$reference_document_vectors
  ),
  n_features = length(
    lsa_reference_space$vocabulary
  ),
  n_dimensions = length(
    lsa_reference_space$singular_values
  ),
  retained_matrix_energy =
    lsa_reference_space$audit$retained_matrix_energy
)
```

# MODUL 6.34 — Assemble and freeze all target and heading segments

```{r}

# MODUL 6.34 — Assemble and freeze all target and heading segments

target_segments_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_target_segments.rds"
)

segment_bundle_version <-
  "M6.34_heading_lemma_fix_2026-07-14_v3"

# Define the selected lemma representation by stable heading ID

expected_heading_lsa <- tibble::tibble(
  heading_id = c(
    "main_title",
    "subheading_1",
    "subheading_2",
    "subheading_3"
  ),
  section_id = c(
    NA_integer_,
    1L,
    2L,
    3L
  ),
  lsa_input_text = c(
    "digitalisierung arbeitswelt",
    "digitalisierung sorge arbeitsplatz",
    "fortschritt erfordern anpassung",
    "menschlich qualität erfolgreich zukunft"
  )
)

downstream_segment_paths <- c(
  file.path(
    actual_lsa_output_dir,
    "modul_6_actual_lsa_target_projections.rds"
  ),
  file.path(
    actual_lsa_output_dir,
    "modul_6_actual_lsa_target_coverage.rds"
  )
)

# Check whether the saved segment checkpoint is current

load_saved_segments <- FALSE
saved_segment_bundle <- NULL

if (file.exists(target_segments_path)) {

  saved_segment_bundle <- tryCatch(
    readRDS(target_segments_path),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (
    is.list(saved_segment_bundle) &&
    all(
      c(
        "version",
        "body_segments",
        "heading_segments",
        "all_target_segments",
        "target_segment_audit"
      ) %in% names(saved_segment_bundle)
    )
  ) {

    saved_heading_check <-
      saved_segment_bundle$heading_segments |>
      dplyr::arrange(segment_order) |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        heading_id = governing_heading_id,
        section_id,
        lsa_input_text
      )

    load_saved_segments <-
      identical(
        saved_segment_bundle$version,
        segment_bundle_version
      ) &&
      identical(
        saved_heading_check,
        expected_heading_lsa
      ) &&
      nrow(
        saved_segment_bundle$all_target_segments
      ) == 129L
  }
}

if (load_saved_segments) {

  target_segment_bundle <- saved_segment_bundle

  body_segments <-
    target_segment_bundle$body_segments

  heading_segments <-
    target_segment_bundle$heading_segments

  all_target_segments <-
    target_segment_bundle$all_target_segments

  target_segment_audit <-
    target_segment_bundle$target_segment_audit

  message(
    "Current target and heading segment checkpoint loaded."
  )

} else {

  # Assemble the 125 heading-free body segments

  body_segments <- dplyr::bind_rows(

    sentence_segment_table |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        text_id,
        model,
        segment_id,
        segment_level = "sentence",
        segment_order = sentence_number,
        paragraph_number,
        section_id,
        governing_heading_id = subheading_id,
        segment_text = body_token_text,
        lsa_input_text = lsa_lemma_text,
        n_input_terms = n_lsa_tokens
      ),

    paragraph_segment_table |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        text_id,
        model,
        segment_id,
        segment_level = "paragraph",
        segment_order = paragraph_number,
        paragraph_number,
        section_id,
        governing_heading_id = subheading_id,
        segment_text = body_token_text,
        lsa_input_text = lsa_lemma_text,
        n_input_terms = n_lsa_tokens
      ),

    whole_body_text_segment_table |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        text_id,
        model,
        segment_id,
        segment_level = "whole_body_text",
        segment_order = 1L,
        paragraph_number = NA_integer_,
        section_id = NA_integer_,
        governing_heading_id = NA_character_,
        segment_text = body_token_text,
        lsa_input_text = lsa_lemma_text,
        n_input_terms = n_lsa_tokens
      )
  )

  # Assemble the four headings by stable heading ID

  heading_segments <- shared_prompt_headings |>
    dplyr::select(
      heading_order,
      heading_id,
      heading_type,
      heading_text
    ) |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      expected_heading_lsa,
      by = "heading_id"
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(heading_order) |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      text_id = "SHARED_PROMPT",
      model = "shared_prompt",
      segment_id = paste0(
        "PROMPT_",
        heading_id
      ),
      segment_level = dplyr::if_else(
        heading_type == "main_title",
        "main_title",
        "subheading"
      ),
      segment_order = as.integer(
        heading_order
      ),
      paragraph_number = NA_integer_,
      section_id,
      governing_heading_id = heading_id,
      segment_text = heading_text,
      lsa_input_text,
      n_input_terms = stringr::str_count(
        lsa_input_text,
        "\\S+"
      )
    )

  # Combine all 129 directly projected segments

  all_target_segments <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    body_segments,
    heading_segments
  )

  target_segment_audit <- all_target_segments |>
    dplyr::count(
      segment_level,
      name = "n_segments"
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(segment_level)

  # Validate the corrected segment bundle

  heading_check <- heading_segments |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      heading_id = governing_heading_id,
      section_id,
      lsa_input_text
    )

  stopifnot(
    nrow(body_segments) == 125L,
    nrow(heading_segments) == 4L,
    nrow(all_target_segments) == 129L,
    !anyDuplicated(
      all_target_segments$segment_id
    ),
    !anyNA(
      all_target_segments$lsa_input_text
    ),
    all(
      all_target_segments$lsa_input_text != ""
    ),
    identical(
      heading_check,
      expected_heading_lsa
    )
  )

  # Freeze the corrected segment bundle

  target_segment_bundle <- list(
    version = segment_bundle_version,
    body_segments = body_segments,
    heading_segments = heading_segments,
    all_target_segments = all_target_segments,
    target_segment_audit = target_segment_audit
  )

  saveRDS(
    target_segment_bundle,
    target_segments_path
  )

  # Remove downstream checkpoints based on older segment data

  unlink(
    downstream_segment_paths[
      file.exists(downstream_segment_paths)
    ]
  )

  message(
    paste0(
      "Corrected target and heading segments frozen; ",
      "dependent projection and coverage checkpoints removed."
    )
  )
}

print(
  target_segment_audit,
  n = Inf
)

print(
  heading_segments |>
    dplyr::select(
      segment_level,
      segment_order,
      governing_heading_id,
      segment_text,
      lsa_input_text,
      n_input_terms
    ),
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)
        
```

```{r}
heading_segments |>
  dplyr::select(
    governing_heading_id,
    lsa_input_text,
    n_input_terms
  )
```
#

```{r}
shared_prompt_headings |>
  dplyr::select(
    heading_order,
    heading_id,
    heading_type,
    heading_text
  ) |>
  print(n = Inf, width = Inf)
```
# ODUL 6.35 — Fold target segments into the fixed LSA space - uses the frozen 129 segments, the frozen vocabulary, IDF, right-singular vectors, and singular values. It does not refit the LSA space.

```{r}

# MODUL 6.35 — Fold target segments into the fixed LSA space
# MODUL 6.35 — Fold target segments into the fixed LSA space

target_projection_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_target_projections.rds"
)

if (file.exists(target_projection_path)) {

  target_projection_bundle <- readRDS(
    target_projection_path
  )

  target_dfm_full <-
    target_projection_bundle$target_dfm_full

  target_dfm <-
    target_projection_bundle$target_dfm

  target_tfidf_matrix <-
    target_projection_bundle$target_tfidf_matrix

  target_segment_vectors_raw <-
    target_projection_bundle$segment_vectors_raw

  target_segment_vectors <-
    target_projection_bundle$segment_vectors

  target_vector_norms <-
    target_projection_bundle$vector_norms

  target_vector_valid <-
    target_projection_bundle$valid_vector

  message(
    "Saved target-segment projections loaded."
  )

} else {

  # Build one DFM for all frozen target and heading segments

  target_tokens <- quanteda::tokens(
    stats::setNames(
      all_target_segments$lsa_input_text,
      all_target_segments$segment_id
    ),
    remove_punct = TRUE,
    remove_symbols = TRUE
  )

  target_dfm_full <- quanteda::dfm(
    target_tokens,
    tolower = FALSE
  )

  # Match the target DFM to the frozen L1 vocabulary

  target_dfm <- quanteda::dfm_match(
    target_dfm_full,
    features = lsa_reference_space$vocabulary
  )

  target_count_matrix <- methods::as(
    target_dfm,
    "dgCMatrix"
  )

  stopifnot(
    identical(
      colnames(target_count_matrix),
      lsa_reference_space$vocabulary
    ),
    identical(
      names(lsa_reference_space$idf),
      lsa_reference_space$vocabulary
    ),
    nrow(target_count_matrix) == 129L
  )

  # Apply the frozen log-TF weighting

  target_log_tf_matrix <- target_count_matrix

  target_log_tf_matrix@x <- log1p(
    target_log_tf_matrix@x
  )

  # Apply the frozen L1-derived IDF weights

  target_tfidf_matrix <-
    target_log_tf_matrix %*%
    Matrix::Diagonal(
      x = as.numeric(
        lsa_reference_space$idf
      )
    )

  # Construct the fixed fold-in basis

  fold_in_basis <-
    lsa_reference_space$right_singular_vectors %*%
    Matrix::Diagonal(
      x = 1 /
        lsa_reference_space$singular_values
    )

  # Fold all segments into the fixed 50-dimensional space

  target_segment_vectors_raw <- as.matrix(
    target_tfidf_matrix %*%
      fold_in_basis
  )

  rownames(target_segment_vectors_raw) <-
    all_target_segments$segment_id

  colnames(target_segment_vectors_raw) <-
    colnames(
      lsa_reference_space$right_singular_vectors
    )

  # Calculate vector norms and identify valid vectors

  target_vector_norms <- sqrt(
    rowSums(
      target_segment_vectors_raw ^ 2
    )
  )

  vector_tolerance <- sqrt(
    .Machine$double.eps
  )

  target_vector_valid <-
    is.finite(target_vector_norms) &
    target_vector_norms > vector_tolerance

  stopifnot(
    any(target_vector_valid)
  )

  # L2-normalize valid projected vectors

  target_segment_vectors <- matrix(
    NA_real_,
    nrow = nrow(target_segment_vectors_raw),
    ncol = ncol(target_segment_vectors_raw),
    dimnames = dimnames(
      target_segment_vectors_raw
    )
  )

  target_segment_vectors[
    target_vector_valid,
  ] <- sweep(
    target_segment_vectors_raw[
      target_vector_valid,
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ],
    MARGIN = 1,
    STATS = target_vector_norms[
      target_vector_valid
    ],
    FUN = "/"
  )

  # Validate the projected space

  stopifnot(
    nrow(target_segment_vectors) == 129L,
    ncol(target_segment_vectors) == 50L,
    all(
      is.finite(
        target_segment_vectors[
          target_vector_valid,
          ,
          drop = FALSE
        ]
      )
    ),
    all(
      abs(
        sqrt(
          rowSums(
            target_segment_vectors[
              target_vector_valid,
              ,
              drop = FALSE
            ] ^ 2
          )
        ) - 1
      ) < 1e-8
    )
  )

  # Freeze the complete projection bundle

  target_projection_bundle <- list(
    segment_metadata = all_target_segments,
    target_dfm_full = target_dfm_full,
    target_dfm = target_dfm,
    target_tfidf_matrix = target_tfidf_matrix,
    segment_vectors_raw = target_segment_vectors_raw,
    segment_vectors = target_segment_vectors,
    vector_norms = target_vector_norms,
    valid_vector = target_vector_valid
  )

  saveRDS(
    target_projection_bundle,
    target_projection_path
  )

  message(
    paste0(
      "Target segments folded into the fixed actual-LSA ",
      "space and frozen."
    )
  )
}

# Summarize the projection result

target_projection_audit <- tibble::tibble(
  n_segments = nrow(
    target_segment_vectors
  ),
  n_dimensions = ncol(
    target_segment_vectors
  ),
  n_valid_vectors = sum(
    target_vector_valid
  ),
  n_invalid_vectors = sum(
    !target_vector_valid
  )
)

print(
  target_projection_audit,
  n = Inf
)

```
#  MODUL 6.36 — Audit vocabulary coverage and vector validity

```{r}

# MODUL 6.36 — Audit vocabulary coverage and vector validity

target_coverage_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_target_coverage.rds"
)

if (file.exists(target_coverage_path)) {

  target_coverage_bundle <- readRDS(
    target_coverage_path
  )

  target_segment_audit <-
    target_coverage_bundle$segment_audit

  target_coverage_summary <-
    target_coverage_bundle$coverage_summary

  message(
    "Saved target vocabulary-coverage audit loaded."
  )

} else {

  # Calculate token and type counts before and after vocabulary matching

  n_input_lemmas <- as.numeric(
    Matrix::rowSums(target_dfm_full)
  )

  n_in_vocabulary <- as.numeric(
    Matrix::rowSums(target_dfm)
  )

  n_input_types <- as.numeric(
    Matrix::rowSums(target_dfm_full > 0)
  )

  n_in_vocabulary_types <- as.numeric(
    Matrix::rowSums(target_dfm > 0)
  )

  # Assemble the complete segment-level audit

  target_segment_audit <- all_target_segments |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      n_input_lemmas = n_input_lemmas,
      n_in_vocabulary = n_in_vocabulary,
      n_oov = n_input_lemmas - n_in_vocabulary,
      token_coverage = dplyr::if_else(
        n_input_lemmas > 0,
        n_in_vocabulary / n_input_lemmas,
        NA_real_
      ),
      n_input_types = n_input_types,
      n_in_vocabulary_types = n_in_vocabulary_types,
      type_coverage = dplyr::if_else(
        n_input_types > 0,
        n_in_vocabulary_types / n_input_types,
        NA_real_
      ),
      vector_norm = target_vector_norms,
      valid_vector = target_vector_valid
    )

  # Create a compact audit by segment level

  target_coverage_summary <- target_segment_audit |>
    dplyr::group_by(segment_level) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_segments = dplyr::n(),
      lsa_coverage_mean = mean(
        token_coverage,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      lsa_coverage_min = min(
        token_coverage,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      n_invalid_segments = sum(
        !valid_vector
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  stopifnot(
    nrow(target_segment_audit) == 129L,
    all(target_segment_audit$n_oov >= 0),
    all(
      target_segment_audit$token_coverage >= 0 &
        target_segment_audit$token_coverage <= 1
    ),
    all(
      target_segment_audit$type_coverage >= 0 &
        target_segment_audit$type_coverage <= 1
    ),
    sum(!target_segment_audit$valid_vector) == 0L
  )

  target_coverage_bundle <- list(
    segment_audit = target_segment_audit,
    coverage_summary = target_coverage_summary
  )

  saveRDS(
    target_coverage_bundle,
    target_coverage_path
  )

  message(
    "Target vocabulary coverage and vector validity audited and frozen."
  )
}

print(
  target_coverage_summary,
  n = Inf
)
```

```{r}
# MODUL 6.37 — Calculate and freeze the x3 similarities

x3_output_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3.rds"
)

if (file.exists(x3_output_path)) {

  x3_bundle <- readRDS(x3_output_path)

  x3_sentence_pairs <- x3_bundle$sentence_pairs
  x3_paragraph_pairs <- x3_bundle$paragraph_pairs
  x3_profiles <- x3_bundle$profiles

  message("Saved x3 similarities loaded.")

} else {

  # Calculate cosine similarity from the normalized segment vectors

  segment_cosine <- function(segment_id_1, segment_id_2) {

    vector_1 <- target_segment_vectors[
      segment_id_1,
      ,
      drop = TRUE
    ]

    vector_2 <- target_segment_vectors[
      segment_id_2,
      ,
      drop = TRUE
    ]

    if (
      anyNA(vector_1) ||
      anyNA(vector_2)
    ) {
      return(NA_real_)
    }

    sum(vector_1 * vector_2)
  }

  # Calculate adjacent-sentence similarities

  x3_sentence_pairs <- all_target_segments |>
    dplyr::filter(
      segment_level == "sentence"
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(
      text_id,
      segment_order
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      text_id,
      model
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      next_segment_id = dplyr::lead(segment_id),
      next_segment_order = dplyr::lead(segment_order)
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(next_segment_id)
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      cosine_similarity = purrr::map2_dbl(
        segment_id,
        next_segment_id,
        segment_cosine
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      text_id,
      model,
      segment_id_1 = segment_id,
      segment_id_2 = next_segment_id,
      sentence_order_1 = segment_order,
      sentence_order_2 = next_segment_order,
      cosine_similarity
    )

  # Calculate adjacent-paragraph similarities

  x3_paragraph_pairs <- all_target_segments |>
    dplyr::filter(
      segment_level == "paragraph"
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(
      text_id,
      segment_order
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      text_id,
      model
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      next_segment_id = dplyr::lead(segment_id),
      next_segment_order = dplyr::lead(segment_order)
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(next_segment_id)
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      cosine_similarity = purrr::map2_dbl(
        segment_id,
        next_segment_id,
        segment_cosine
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      text_id,
      model,
      segment_id_1 = segment_id,
      segment_id_2 = next_segment_id,
      paragraph_order_1 = segment_order,
      paragraph_order_2 = next_segment_order,
      cosine_similarity
    )

  # Assemble the text-level x3 profile

  x3_sentence_summary <- x3_sentence_pairs |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      text_id,
      model
    ) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_mean = mean(
        cosine_similarity,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_sd = stats::sd(
        cosine_similarity,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      n_adjacent_sentence_pairs = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  x3_paragraph_summary <- x3_paragraph_pairs |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      text_id,
      model
    ) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      x3_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_mean = mean(
        cosine_similarity,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  x3_profiles <- x3_sentence_summary |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      x3_paragraph_summary,
      by = c(
        "text_id",
        "model"
      )
    )

  stopifnot(
    nrow(x3_profiles) == 4L,
    all(
      is.finite(
        x3_profiles$x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_mean
      )
    ),
    all(
      is.finite(
        x3_profiles$x3_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_mean
      )
    ),
    all(
      x3_sentence_pairs$cosine_similarity >= -1 &
        x3_sentence_pairs$cosine_similarity <= 1
    ),
    all(
      x3_paragraph_pairs$cosine_similarity >= -1 &
        x3_paragraph_pairs$cosine_similarity <= 1
    )
  )

  x3_bundle <- list(
    sentence_pairs = x3_sentence_pairs,
    paragraph_pairs = x3_paragraph_pairs,
    profiles = x3_profiles
  )

  saveRDS(
    x3_bundle,
    x3_output_path
  )

  message("x3 similarities calculated and frozen.")
}

print(
  x3_profiles,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)
```
# Calculates the within-text gradient - 

```{r}
# Calculate within-text semantic-continuity gradients

x3_sentence_gradient <- x3_sentence_pairs |>
  dplyr::group_by(
    text_id,
    model
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(
    sentence_order_1,
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    normalized_text_position =
      (dplyr::row_number() - 1) /
      pmax(dplyr::n() - 1, 1)
  ) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_gradient =
      if (dplyr::n() > 1L) {
        unname(
          stats::coef(
            stats::lm(
              cosine_similarity ~ normalized_text_position
            )
          )[["normalized_text_position"]]
        )
      } else {
        NA_real_
      },

    x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_first_third =
      mean(
        cosine_similarity[
          normalized_text_position <= 1 / 3
        ],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),

    x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_final_third =
      mean(
        cosine_similarity[
          normalized_text_position >= 2 / 3
        ],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),

    x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_retention =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_final_third -
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_first_third,

    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(
  x3_sentence_gradient,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)
```
#

```{r}
# MODUL 6.37a — Calculate and freeze x3 sentence-gradient diagnostics

x3_gradient_diagnostics <- x3_sentence_pairs |>
  dplyr::group_by(text_id, model) |>
  dplyr::mutate(normalized_position = (dplyr::row_number() - 1) / (dplyr::n() - 1)) |>
  dplyr::group_modify(~ {
    fit <- stats::lm(cosine_similarity ~ normalized_position, data = .x)
    thirds <- cut(.x$normalized_position, c(-Inf, 1/3, 2/3, Inf), labels = c("first", "middle", "final"))
    means <- tapply(.x$cosine_similarity, thirds, mean)
    tibble::tibble(
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_gradient = unname(stats::coef(fit)[2]),
      x3_adjacent_sentence_gradient_se = summary(fit)$coefficients[2, 2],
      x3_adjacent_sentence_gradient_r2 = summary(fit)$r.squared,
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_first_third = unname(means["first"]),
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_middle_third = unname(means["middle"]),
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_final_third = unname(means["final"]),
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_retention = unname(means["final"] - means["first"])
    )
  }) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

x3_profiles_extended <- x3_profiles |>
  dplyr::left_join(x3_gradient_diagnostics, by = c("text_id", "model"))

saveRDS(list(profiles = x3_profiles_extended, diagnostics = x3_gradient_diagnostics),
        file.path(actual_lsa_output_dir, "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3_gradient.rds"))

print(x3_profiles_extended, n = Inf, width = Inf)
print(x3_gradient_diagnostics, n = Inf, width = Inf)
View(x3_gradient_diagnostics)

readr::write_csv(x3_gradient_diagnostics,
                 file.path(actual_lsa_output_dir, "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3_gradient_diagnostics.csv"))
```

#

```{r}
print(x3_profiles_extended, n = Inf, width = Inf)
View(x3_profiles_extended)

readr::write_csv(x3_profiles_extended,
                 file.path(actual_lsa_output_dir, "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3_profiles_extended.csv"))
```


# Plot save: modul_6_x3_sentence_gradient

```{r}
# MODUL 6.37b — Plot x3 sentence-gradient diagnostics

x3_plot_data <- x3_sentence_pairs |>
  dplyr::group_by(text_id, model) |> dplyr::mutate(normalized_position = (dplyr::row_number() - 1) / (dplyr::n() - 1)) |> dplyr::ungroup()

x3_plot_labels <- x3_gradient_diagnostics |>
  dplyr::mutate(label = sprintf("Slope = %.3f\nSE = %.3f | R² = %.3f\nFirst = %.3f | Middle = %.3f | Final = %.3f\nRetention = %.3f",
                                x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_gradient, x3_adjacent_sentence_gradient_se,
                                x3_adjacent_sentence_gradient_r2, x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_first_third,
                                x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_middle_third, x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_final_third,
                                x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_retention))

modul_6_x3_sentence_gradient_diagnostics <- ggplot2::ggplot(x3_plot_data, ggplot2::aes(normalized_position, cosine_similarity)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 0.5) + ggplot2::geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(data = x3_plot_labels, ggplot2::aes(x = 0, y = Inf, label = label), hjust = 0, vjust = 1.1, size = 2.5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ model) + ggplot2::labs(title = "MODUL 6 x3 Sentence-Gradient Diagnostics", x = "Normalized sentence-pair position", y = "Adjacent-sentence similarity")

modul_6_x3_sentence_gradient_diagnostics
ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(actual_lsa_output_dir, "modul_6_x3_sentence_gradient_diagnostics.png"), modul_6_x3_sentence_gradient_diagnostics, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# MODUL 6.37d — Human-referenced x3 trajectory comparison

human_level <- grep("human", unique(x3_plot_data$model), ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]
stopifnot(!is.na(human_level))
x3_plot_data$model <- stats::relevel(factor(x3_plot_data$model), ref = human_level)
x3_human_model <- stats::lm(cosine_similarity ~ normalized_position * model, data = x3_plot_data)

x3_human_predictions <- tidyr::expand_grid(normalized_position = seq(0, 1, length.out = 101),
                                           model = levels(x3_plot_data$model))
x3_human_predictions$predicted_similarity <- predict(x3_human_model, newdata = x3_human_predictions)

x3_human_predictions <- x3_human_predictions |>
  dplyr::group_by(normalized_position) |>
  dplyr::mutate(human_prediction = predicted_similarity[as.character(model) == human_level],
                human_difference = predicted_similarity - human_prediction) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

x3_human_trajectory_summary <- x3_human_predictions |>
  dplyr::filter(as.character(model) != human_level) |>
  dplyr::group_by(model) |>
  dplyr::summarise(x3_human_curve_distance_mean = mean(abs(human_difference)),
                   difference_beginning = dplyr::first(human_difference),
                   difference_middle = human_difference[normalized_position == 0.5],
                   difference_end = dplyr::last(human_difference), .groups = "drop")

model_labels <- c(chatgpt_native = "ChatGPT", claude_native = "Claude",
                  gemini_native = "Gemini", human = "Human")

modul_6_x3_human_reference <- ggplot2::ggplot(x3_human_predictions, ggplot2::aes(normalized_position, predicted_similarity, color = model)) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_discrete(name = "Model", labels = model_labels) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "Human-Referenced x3 Trajectories", x = "Normalized sentence-pair position", y = "Predicted adjacent-sentence similarity")

saveRDS(list(human_reference = human_level, model = x3_human_model, predictions = x3_human_predictions,
             summary = x3_human_trajectory_summary),
        file.path(actual_lsa_output_dir, "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3_human_reference.rds"))
ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(actual_lsa_output_dir, "modul_6_x3_human_reference.png"),
                modul_6_x3_human_reference, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)

print(x3_human_trajectory_summary, n = Inf)
modul_6_x3_human_reference
```
# Note: This cell fits a joint regression model of adjacent-sentence similarity over normalized text position, using the Human baseline as the reference category. It predicts the Human and LM trajectories on a common 0–1 scale and calculates each LM’s difference from Human at the beginning, middle, and end, as well as the mean absolute curve distance. The fitted trajectories, Human-relative summary, regression model, and combined comparison plot are saved for diagnostic analysis.


# MODUL 6.37e — Build and project connector-only x3 segments

```{r}

# MODUL 6.37e — Build and project connector-only x3 segments

x3co_source <- readRDS(file.path(project_root, "data_prep_CCP_output", "current_texts_parsed.rds")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(pos_clean = stringr::str_to_upper(stringr::str_trim(as.character(pos))))

x3co_sentence_map <- sentence_segment_table |>
  dplyr::transmute(text_id = as.character(text_id), sentence_id = as.integer(sentence_id),
                   paragraph_id = as.character(paragraph_id), model) |>
  dplyr::distinct()

stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(x3co_sentence_map[c("text_id", "sentence_id")]))

x3co_tokens <- x3co_source |>
  dplyr::filter(pos_clean %in% c("CCONJ", "SCONJ"), !is.na(lemma), stringr::str_trim(lemma) != "") |>
  dplyr::transmute(text_id = as.character(text_id), sentence_id = as.integer(sentence_id),
                   lemma = stringr::str_to_lower(stringr::str_trim(lemma)), pos_clean) |>
  dplyr::inner_join(x3co_sentence_map, by = c("text_id", "sentence_id"))

stopifnot(nrow(x3co_tokens) > 0L, !anyNA(x3co_tokens$paragraph_id))
print(dplyr::count(x3co_tokens, pos_clean, sort = TRUE), n = Inf)

x3co_sentence_segments <- x3co_sentence_map |>
  dplyr::arrange(text_id, sentence_id) |> dplyr::group_by(text_id) |>
  dplyr::mutate(segment_order = dplyr::row_number()) |> dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::left_join(x3co_tokens |> dplyr::group_by(text_id, sentence_id) |>
                     dplyr::summarise(terms = paste(lemma, collapse = " "), n_connectors = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop"),
                   by = c("text_id", "sentence_id")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(segment_id = paste0("x3co_s_", dplyr::row_number()),
                terms = tidyr::replace_na(terms, ""), n_connectors = tidyr::replace_na(n_connectors, 0L))

x3co_paragraph_segments <- paragraph_segment_table |>
  dplyr::transmute(text_id = as.character(text_id), paragraph_id = as.character(paragraph_id), model) |>
  dplyr::distinct() |> dplyr::arrange(text_id, paragraph_id) |> dplyr::group_by(text_id) |>
  dplyr::mutate(segment_order = dplyr::row_number()) |> dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::left_join(x3co_tokens |> dplyr::group_by(text_id, paragraph_id) |>
                     dplyr::summarise(terms = paste(lemma, collapse = " "), n_connectors = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop"),
                   by = c("text_id", "paragraph_id")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(segment_id = paste0("x3co_p_", dplyr::row_number()),
                terms = tidyr::replace_na(terms, ""), n_connectors = tidyr::replace_na(n_connectors, 0L))

project_x3co <- function(x) {
  m <- quanteda::dfm_match(quanteda::dfm(quanteda::tokens(x$terms)), features = lsa_reference_space$vocabulary)
  m <- methods::as(m, "dgCMatrix"); m@x <- log1p(m@x)
  m <- m %*% Matrix::Diagonal(x = lsa_reference_space$idf)
  v <- as.matrix(m %*% (lsa_reference_space$right_singular_vectors %*%
                          diag(1 / lsa_reference_space$singular_values)))
  norms <- sqrt(rowSums(v^2)); v <- sweep(v, 1, norms, "/"); v[!is.finite(v)] <- NA_real_
  rownames(v) <- x$segment_id
  list(vectors = v, valid = is.finite(norms) & norms > 0)
}

x3co_sentence_projection <- project_x3co(x3co_sentence_segments)
x3co_paragraph_projection <- project_x3co(x3co_paragraph_segments)

saveRDS(list(sentence_segments = x3co_sentence_segments, paragraph_segments = x3co_paragraph_segments,
             sentence_projection = x3co_sentence_projection, paragraph_projection = x3co_paragraph_projection),
        file.path(actual_lsa_output_dir, "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3co_segments.rds"))

dplyr::bind_rows(
  x3co_sentence_segments |> dplyr::summarise(level = "sentence", segments = dplyr::n(),
                                              with_connectors = sum(n_connectors > 0), connectors = sum(n_connectors)),
  x3co_paragraph_segments |> dplyr::summarise(level = "paragraph", segments = dplyr::n(),
                                               with_connectors = sum(n_connectors > 0), connectors = sum(n_connectors))
)
```

# 

```{r}
# MODUL 6.37g — Calculate and freeze text-internal connector continuity

x3cc_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3co_connector_continuity.rds"
)

if (file.exists(x3cc_path)) {

  x3cc_bundle <- readRDS(x3cc_path)
  x3cc_sentence_segments <- x3cc_bundle$sentence_segments
  x3cc_projection <- x3cc_bundle$projection
  x3cc_continuity <- x3cc_bundle$continuity
  x3cc_summary <- x3cc_bundle$summary

  message("Saved connector continuity loaded.")

} else {

  x3cc_sentence_segments <- x3co_sentence_segments |>
    dplyr::select(
      text_id, model, paragraph_id,
      sentence_id, segment_order
    ) |>
    dplyr::distinct() |>
    tidyr::crossing(
      connector_type = c("CCONJ", "SCONJ")
    ) |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      x3co_tokens |>
        dplyr::group_by(
          text_id, model, sentence_id,
          connector_type = pos_clean
        ) |>
        dplyr::summarise(
          terms = paste(lemma, collapse = " "),
          n_connectors = dplyr::n(),
          .groups = "drop"
        ),
      by = c(
        "text_id", "model",
        "sentence_id", "connector_type"
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      terms = tidyr::replace_na(terms, ""),
      n_connectors = tidyr::replace_na(n_connectors, 0L),
      segment_id = paste(
        text_id, sentence_id, connector_type,
        sep = "_"
      )
    )

  x3cc_projection <- project_x3co(
    x3cc_sentence_segments
  )

  x3cc_sentence_segments$valid_vector <-
    x3cc_projection$valid

  x3cc_cosine <- function(a, b) {

    vectors <- x3cc_projection$vectors
    pair <- vectors[c(a, b), , drop = FALSE]

    if (any(!is.finite(pair))) {
      return(NA_real_)
    }

    sum(pair[1, ] * pair[2, ])
  }

  x3cc_continuity <- x3cc_sentence_segments |>
    dplyr::arrange(
      text_id, connector_type, segment_order
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      text_id, model, connector_type
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      next_sentence_id = dplyr::lead(sentence_id),
      next_segment_id = dplyr::lead(segment_id)
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(next_segment_id)
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      normalized_position =
        (dplyr::row_number() - 1) /
        pmax(dplyr::n() - 1, 1),
      transition_id = paste(
        text_id, sentence_id,
        next_sentence_id, connector_type,
        sep = "_"
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      cc_score = purrr::map2_dbl(
        segment_id,
        next_segment_id,
        x3cc_cosine
      )
    )

  x3cc_summary <- x3cc_continuity |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      text_id, model, connector_type
    ) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_pairs = dplyr::n(),
      n_valid_pairs = sum(is.finite(cc_score)),
      x3co_similarity_mean =
        if (n_valid_pairs > 0L) {
          mean(cc_score[is.finite(cc_score)])
        } else {
          NA_real_
        },
      x3co_similarity_sd =
        if (n_valid_pairs > 1L) {
          stats::sd(cc_score[is.finite(cc_score)])
        } else {
          NA_real_
        },
      pair_coverage = n_valid_pairs / n_pairs,
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  x3cc_bundle <- list(
    sentence_segments = x3cc_sentence_segments,
    projection = x3cc_projection,
    continuity = x3cc_continuity,
    summary = x3cc_summary,
    plot_data = x3cc_continuity
  )

  saveRDS(
    x3cc_bundle,
    x3cc_path
  )

  readr::write_csv(
    x3cc_continuity,
    file.path(
      actual_lsa_output_dir,
      "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3co_connector_pairs.csv"
    )
  )

  readr::write_csv(
    x3cc_summary,
    file.path(
      actual_lsa_output_dir,
      "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3co_connector_summary.csv"
    )
  )

  message("Connector continuity calculated and frozen.")
}

stopifnot(
  all(
    c("CCONJ", "SCONJ") %in%
      unique(x3cc_continuity$connector_type)
  )
)

print(
  x3cc_summary,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)
```

# # MODUL 6.37h — Plot Human-centered connector-transition similarity

```{r}

# MODUL 6.37h — Plot Human-centered connector continuity

# Load frozen results

x3cc_path <- file.path(
  project_root,
  "measure_outputs",
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_connector_continuity_human_centered.rds"
)

stopifnot(file.exists(x3cc_path))
x3cc_frozen <- readRDS(x3cc_path)

# Prepare plot data

x3cc_plot <- x3cc_frozen$human_centered |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    model = dplyr::recode(
      as.character(model),
      chatgpt_native = "ChatGPT",
      claude_native = "Claude",
      gemini_native = "Gemini"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    model, connector_type, normalized_position,
    LM = cc_score, Human = human_score
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    c(LM, Human),
    names_to = "source",
    values_to = "connector_continuity"
  )

# Build plot

modul_6_connector_continuity <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  x3cc_plot,
  ggplot2::aes(
    normalized_position,
    connector_continuity,
    color = source,
    group = source
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 1.2) +
  ggplot2::facet_grid(connector_type ~ model) +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 1)) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank()
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Connector Continuity: Human versus Language Models",
    x = "Normalized sentence-transition position",
    y = "Adjacent-sentence connector cosine",
    color = NULL
  )

# Freeze and export plot

saveRDS(
  list(data = x3cc_plot, plot = modul_6_connector_continuity),
  file.path(
    project_root,
    "measure_outputs",
    "modul_6_connector_continuity_plot.rds"
  )
)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  file.path(
    project_root,
    "measure_outputs",
    "modul_6_connector_continuity.png"
  ),
  modul_6_connector_continuity,
  width = 11,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)

# Display plot

modul_6_connector_continuity
```
# Note: Decoupling of Semantics and Propositional Structure  (NEEDS REVISION)

The indices’ x3co plotting (Plot x) suggested that, within a very similar topic and semantic space, the logico‑semantic structure of the discourse is organised relatively differently. As realised through the patterning of connectors, this appears as a connector‑only latent structural skeleton versus a “content mass”.

If content‑word similarity shows monotonic decay (e.g., thematic shifts as sentences progress), but connector continuity does not, it means that the logical architecture of the text is decoupled from the topical progression we can observe within the human baseline. So even when the human writer and the models are writing or providing output about basically the same thing, the way they thread that content with coordinating and subordinating relations is not coupled to the semantic content in the same way as in the human texts.

# MODUL 6.38 -  Build and project x3cw paragraph

```{r}

# MODUL 6.38 — Build and project x3cw paragraphs

# Define output path

x3cw_segments_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3cw_segments.rds"
)

# Load frozen output when available

if (file.exists(x3cw_segments_path)) {

  x3cw_segments_bundle <- readRDS(
    x3cw_segments_path
  )

  x3cw_paragraph_segments <-
    x3cw_segments_bundle$paragraph_segments

  x3cw_projection <-
    x3cw_segments_bundle$projection

  message("Saved x3cw paragraph segments loaded.")

} else {

  # Build the validated sentence-to-paragraph map

  x3cw_sentence_map <- sentence_segment_table |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      text_id = as.character(text_id),
      sentence_id = as.integer(sentence_id),
      paragraph_id = as.character(paragraph_id),
      paragraph_number = as.integer(paragraph_number),
      model
    ) |>
    dplyr::distinct()

  # Prepare content-word tokens

  x3cw_tokens <- readRDS(
    file.path(
      project_root,
      "data_prep_CCP_output",
      "current_texts_parsed.rds"
    )
  ) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      parsed_paragraph_id = paragraph_id
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      text_id = as.character(text_id),
      sentence_id = as.integer(sentence_id),
      pos_clean = stringr::str_to_upper(
        stringr::str_trim(
          as.character(pos)
        )
      ),
      lemma_clean = stringr::str_to_lower(
        stringr::str_trim(
          as.character(lemma)
        )
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(
      pos_clean %in% c(
        "NOUN",
        "VERB",
        "ADJ",
        "ADV"
      ),
      !is.na(lemma_clean),
      lemma_clean != "",
      lemma_clean != "null"
    ) |>
    dplyr::inner_join(
      x3cw_sentence_map,
      by = c(
        "text_id",
        "sentence_id"
      ),
      relationship = "many-to-one"
    )

  # Build content-word paragraph segments

  x3cw_paragraph_segments <- paragraph_segment_table |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      text_id = as.character(text_id),
      model,
      paragraph_id = as.character(paragraph_id),
      paragraph_number = as.integer(paragraph_number),
      source_segment_id = segment_id
    ) |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      x3cw_tokens |>
        dplyr::group_by(
          text_id,
          model,
          paragraph_id,
          paragraph_number
        ) |>
        dplyr::summarise(
          terms = paste(
            lemma_clean,
            collapse = " "
          ),
          n_content_tokens = dplyr::n(),
          .groups = "drop"
        ),
      by = c(
        "text_id",
        "model",
        "paragraph_id",
        "paragraph_number"
      ),
      relationship = "one-to-one"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      segment_id = paste0(
        source_segment_id,
        "_x3cw"
      ),
      terms = tidyr::replace_na(
        terms,
        ""
      ),
      n_content_tokens = tidyr::replace_na(
        n_content_tokens,
        0L
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(
      text_id,
      paragraph_number
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      text_id,
      model
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      segment_order = dplyr::row_number()
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup()

  # Construct the matched DFM

  x3cw_dfm <- quanteda::dfm_match(
    quanteda::dfm(
      quanteda::tokens(
        x3cw_paragraph_segments$terms
      )
    ),
    features = lsa_reference_space$vocabulary
  )

  x3cw_matrix <- methods::as(
    x3cw_dfm,
    "dgCMatrix"
  )

  x3cw_matrix@x <- log1p(
    x3cw_matrix@x
  )

  x3cw_matrix <- x3cw_matrix %*%
    Matrix::Diagonal(
      x = lsa_reference_space$idf
    )

  # Fold segments into the frozen LSA space

  x3cw_vectors_raw <- as.matrix(
    x3cw_matrix %*%
      (
        lsa_reference_space$
          right_singular_vectors %*%
          diag(
            1 /
              lsa_reference_space$
                singular_values
          )
      )
  )

  x3cw_norms <- sqrt(
    rowSums(
      x3cw_vectors_raw^2
    )
  )

  x3cw_valid <- is.finite(
    x3cw_norms
  ) & x3cw_norms > 0

  x3cw_vectors <- matrix(
    NA_real_,
    nrow = nrow(
      x3cw_vectors_raw
    ),
    ncol = ncol(
      x3cw_vectors_raw
    )
  )

  x3cw_vectors[x3cw_valid, ] <- sweep(
    x3cw_vectors_raw[
      x3cw_valid,
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ],
    1,
    x3cw_norms[x3cw_valid],
    "/"
  )

  rownames(x3cw_vectors) <-
    x3cw_paragraph_segments$segment_id

  x3cw_projection <- list(
    vectors = x3cw_vectors,
    norms = x3cw_norms,
    valid = x3cw_valid
  )

  # Validate and freeze

  stopifnot(
    nrow(
      x3cw_paragraph_segments
    ) == 15L,
    all(
      x3cw_paragraph_segments$
        n_content_tokens > 0L
    ),
    !anyDuplicated(
      x3cw_paragraph_segments$
        segment_id
    ),
    identical(
      rownames(
        x3cw_projection$vectors
      ),
      x3cw_paragraph_segments$
        segment_id
    )
  )

  x3cw_segments_bundle <- list(
    pos_keep = c(
      "NOUN",
      "VERB",
      "ADJ",
      "ADV"
    ),
    paragraph_segments =
      x3cw_paragraph_segments,
    projection =
      x3cw_projection
  )

  saveRDS(
    x3cw_segments_bundle,
    x3cw_segments_path
  )

  message(
    "x3cw paragraph segments projected and frozen."
  )
}

# Display audit

x3cw_paragraph_segments |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_paragraphs = dplyr::n(),
    n_content_tokens = sum(
      n_content_tokens
    ),
    n_valid_vectors = sum(
      x3cw_projection$valid
    )
  ) |>
  print(
    width = Inf
  )

```
# # MODUL 6.37j — Calculate and freeze x3cw continuity

```{r}

# MODUL 6.37j — Calculate and freeze x3cw continuity

x3cw_output_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3cw_paragraph_continuity.rds"
)

if (file.exists(x3cw_output_path)) {

  x3cw_bundle <- readRDS(x3cw_output_path)
  x3cw_paragraph_pairs <- x3cw_bundle$paragraph_pairs
  x3cw_profiles <- x3cw_bundle$profiles

  message("Saved x3cw continuity loaded.")

} else {

  x3cw_cosine <- function(segment_1, segment_2) {

    vector_1 <- x3cw_projection$vectors[
      segment_1,
      ,
      drop = TRUE
    ]

    vector_2 <- x3cw_projection$vectors[
      segment_2,
      ,
      drop = TRUE
    ]

    if (
      anyNA(vector_1) ||
      anyNA(vector_2)
    ) {
      return(NA_real_)
    }

    sum(vector_1 * vector_2)
  }

  x3cw_paragraph_pairs <- x3cw_paragraph_segments |>
    dplyr::arrange(
      text_id,
      segment_order
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      text_id,
      model
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      next_segment_id = dplyr::lead(segment_id),
      next_paragraph_id = dplyr::lead(paragraph_id),
      next_paragraph_number =
        dplyr::lead(paragraph_number)
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(next_segment_id)
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      normalized_position =
        (dplyr::row_number() - 1) /
        pmax(dplyr::n() - 1, 1)
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      x3cw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity =
        purrr::map2_dbl(
          segment_id,
          next_segment_id,
          x3cw_cosine
        )
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      text_id,
      model,
      paragraph_id,
      paragraph_number,
      next_paragraph_id,
      next_paragraph_number,
      segment_id_1 = segment_id,
      segment_id_2 = next_segment_id,
      normalized_position,
      x3cw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity
    )

  x3cw_profiles <- x3cw_paragraph_pairs |>
    dplyr::group_by(
      text_id,
      model
    ) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      x3cw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_mean =
        mean(
          x3cw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity,
          na.rm = TRUE
        ),
      n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs = dplyr::n(),
      n_valid_x3cw_pairs = sum(
        is.finite(
          x3cw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity
        )
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  valid_scores <-
    x3cw_paragraph_pairs$
      x3cw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity

  valid_scores <- valid_scores[
    is.finite(valid_scores)
  ]

  stopifnot(
    nrow(x3cw_paragraph_pairs) == 11L,
    nrow(x3cw_profiles) == 4L,
    all(valid_scores >= -1 & valid_scores <= 1)
  )

  x3cw_bundle <- list(
    definition =
      "Content-word-only paragraph fold-in using NOUN, VERB, ADJ, and ADV within the frozen seven-POS LSA reference space.",
    paragraph_segments = x3cw_paragraph_segments,
    projection = x3cw_projection,
    paragraph_pairs = x3cw_paragraph_pairs,
    profiles = x3cw_profiles
  )

  saveRDS(
    x3cw_bundle,
    x3cw_output_path
  )

  readr::write_csv(
    x3cw_paragraph_pairs,
    file.path(
      actual_lsa_output_dir,
      "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3cw_paragraph_pairs.csv"
    )
  )

  readr::write_csv(
    x3cw_profiles,
    file.path(
      actual_lsa_output_dir,
      "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3cw_profiles.csv"
    )
  )

  message("x3cw paragraph continuity calculated and frozen.")
}

print(
  x3cw_profiles,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)

print(
  x3cw_paragraph_pairs,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)
```


# # MODUL 6.38 — Canonicalize and freeze x3s, x3p, and x3pcw

```{r}

# MODUL 6.38 — Canonicalize and freeze x3s, x3p, and x3pcw

# 1. Define input and output paths

x3_legacy_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3.rds"
)

x3s_gradient_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3_gradient.rds"
)

x3pcw_legacy_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3cw_paragraph_continuity.rds"
)

x3s_output_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3s_sentence_continuity.rds"
)

x3p_output_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3p_paragraph_continuity.rds"
)

x3pcw_output_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3pcw_paragraph_continuity.rds"
)

# 2. Load the frozen legacy objects

stopifnot(
  file.exists(x3_legacy_path),
  file.exists(x3s_gradient_path),
  file.exists(x3pcw_legacy_path)
)

x3_legacy <- readRDS(x3_legacy_path)
x3s_gradient_legacy <- readRDS(x3s_gradient_path)
x3pcw_legacy <- readRDS(x3pcw_legacy_path)

# 3. Build the canonical x3s sentence layer

x3s_sentence_pairs <- x3_legacy$sentence_pairs |>
  dplyr::arrange(
    text_id,
    sentence_order_1
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(
    text_id,
    model
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    normalized_position =
      (dplyr::row_number() - 1) /
      pmax(dplyr::n() - 1, 1)
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::rename(
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity =
      cosine_similarity
  )

x3s_profiles <- x3s_gradient_legacy$profiles |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    text_id,
    model,
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity_mean =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_mean,
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity_sd =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_sd,
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity_gradient =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_gradient,
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_gradient_se =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_gradient_se,
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_gradient_r2 =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_gradient_r2,
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity_first_third =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_first_third,
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity_middle_third =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_middle_third,
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity_final_third =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_final_third,
    x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity_retention =
      x3_adjacent_sentence_similarity_retention,
    n_x3s_adjacent_sentence_pairs =
      n_adjacent_sentence_pairs
  )

# 4. Build the canonical x3p paragraph layer

x3p_paragraph_pairs <- x3_legacy$paragraph_pairs |>
  dplyr::arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_order_1
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(
    text_id,
    model
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    normalized_position =
      (dplyr::row_number() - 1) /
      pmax(dplyr::n() - 1, 1)
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::rename(
    x3p_adjacent_paragraph_similarity =
      cosine_similarity
  )

x3p_profiles <- x3_legacy$profiles |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    text_id,
    model,
    x3p_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_mean =
      x3_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_mean,
    n_x3p_adjacent_paragraph_pairs =
      n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs
  )

# 5. Build the canonical x3pcw paragraph layer

x3pcw_paragraph_pairs <-
  x3pcw_legacy$paragraph_pairs |>
  dplyr::rename(
    x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity =
      x3cw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity
  )

x3pcw_profiles <- x3pcw_legacy$profiles |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    text_id,
    model,
    x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_mean =
      x3cw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_mean,
    n_x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_pairs =
      n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs,
    n_valid_x3pcw_pairs =
      n_valid_x3cw_pairs
  )

# 6. Validate the canonical layers

stopifnot(
  nrow(x3s_profiles) == 4L,
  nrow(x3p_paragraph_pairs) == 11L,
  nrow(x3p_profiles) == 4L,
  nrow(x3pcw_paragraph_pairs) == 11L,
  nrow(x3pcw_profiles) == 4L,
  sum(x3s_profiles$n_x3s_adjacent_sentence_pairs) ==
    nrow(x3s_sentence_pairs),
  sum(x3p_profiles$n_x3p_adjacent_paragraph_pairs) ==
    nrow(x3p_paragraph_pairs),
  sum(x3pcw_profiles$n_x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_pairs) ==
    nrow(x3pcw_paragraph_pairs),
  all(is.finite(
    x3s_sentence_pairs$x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity
  )),
  all(is.finite(
    x3p_paragraph_pairs$x3p_adjacent_paragraph_similarity
  )),
  all(is.finite(
    x3pcw_paragraph_pairs$
      x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity
  ))
)

# 7. Freeze the canonical layers

x3s_bundle <- list(
  level = "sentence",
  definition =
    "Sentence-level adjacent semantic continuity.",
  sentence_pairs = x3s_sentence_pairs,
  profiles = x3s_profiles
)

x3p_bundle <- list(
  level = "paragraph",
  definition =
    "Paragraph-level adjacent semantic continuity using the full seven-POS target layer.",
  paragraph_pairs = x3p_paragraph_pairs,
  profiles = x3p_profiles
)

x3pcw_bundle <- list(
  level = "paragraph_content_words",
  definition =
    "Paragraph-level adjacent topic continuity using NOUN, VERB, ADJ, and ADV.",
  pos_keep = c(
    "NOUN",
    "VERB",
    "ADJ",
    "ADV"
  ),
  paragraph_segments =
    x3pcw_legacy$paragraph_segments,
  projection =
    x3pcw_legacy$projection,
  paragraph_pairs =
    x3pcw_paragraph_pairs,
  profiles =
    x3pcw_profiles
)

saveRDS(x3s_bundle, x3s_output_path)
saveRDS(x3p_bundle, x3p_output_path)
saveRDS(x3pcw_bundle, x3pcw_output_path)

readr::write_csv(
  x3s_sentence_pairs,
  file.path(
    actual_lsa_output_dir,
    "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3s_sentence_pairs.csv"
  )
)

readr::write_csv(
  x3p_paragraph_pairs,
  file.path(
    actual_lsa_output_dir,
    "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3p_paragraph_pairs.csv"
  )
)

readr::write_csv(
  x3pcw_paragraph_pairs,
  file.path(
    actual_lsa_output_dir,
    "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3pcw_paragraph_pairs.csv"
  )
)

readr::write_csv(
  x3s_profiles,
  file.path(
    actual_lsa_output_dir,
    "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3s_profiles.csv"
  )
)

readr::write_csv(
  x3p_profiles,
  file.path(
    actual_lsa_output_dir,
    "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3p_profiles.csv"
  )
)

readr::write_csv(
  x3pcw_profiles,
  file.path(
    actual_lsa_output_dir,
    "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3pcw_profiles.csv"
  )
)

# 8. Display the canonicalization audit

tibble::tibble(
  layer = c(
    "x3s sentence pairs",
    "x3s profiles",
    "x3p paragraph pairs",
    "x3p profiles",
    "x3pcw paragraph pairs",
    "x3pcw profiles"
  ),
  rows = c(
    nrow(x3s_sentence_pairs),
    nrow(x3s_profiles),
    nrow(x3p_paragraph_pairs),
    nrow(x3p_profiles),
    nrow(x3pcw_paragraph_pairs),
    nrow(x3pcw_profiles)
  )
) |>
  print(
    n = Inf,
    width = Inf
  )
```


# 8. Reload and verify the canonical frozen objects

```{r}
# 8. Reload and verify the canonical frozen objects

x3s_reload <- readRDS(x3s_output_path)
x3p_reload <- readRDS(x3p_output_path)
x3pcw_reload <- readRDS(x3pcw_output_path)

stopifnot(
  "x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity" %in%
    names(x3s_reload$sentence_pairs),

  "x3s_adjacent_sentence_similarity_mean" %in%
    names(x3s_reload$profiles),

  "x3p_adjacent_paragraph_similarity" %in%
    names(x3p_reload$paragraph_pairs),

  "x3p_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_mean" %in%
    names(x3p_reload$profiles),

  "x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity" %in%
    names(x3pcw_reload$paragraph_pairs),

  "x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_mean" %in%
    names(x3pcw_reload$profiles)
)

message(
  "Canonical x3s, x3p, and x3pcw names verified in frozen outputs."
)
```


# MODUL 6.38a — Calculate and freeze x3pcw topic-continuity (alias semantic similarity continuity) gradients

```{r}

# MODUL 6.38a — Calculate and freeze x3pcw topic-continuity gradients

# 1. Define input and output paths

x3pcw_input_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3pcw_paragraph_continuity.rds"
)

x3pcw_gradient_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3pcw_topic_continuity_gradient.rds"
)

x3pcw_gradient_csv_path <- file.path(
  actual_lsa_output_dir,
  "modul_6_actual_lsa_x3pcw_topic_continuity_gradient.csv"
)

# 2. Load the canonical x3pcw layer

stopifnot(
  file.exists(x3pcw_input_path)
)

x3pcw_bundle <- readRDS(
  x3pcw_input_path
)

x3pcw_paragraph_pairs <-
  x3pcw_bundle$paragraph_pairs

x3pcw_profiles <-
  x3pcw_bundle$profiles

stopifnot(
  nrow(x3pcw_paragraph_pairs) == 11L,
  nrow(x3pcw_profiles) == 4L,
  all(
    c(
      "text_id",
      "model",
      "normalized_position",
      "x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity"
    ) %in%
      names(x3pcw_paragraph_pairs)
  )
)

# 3. Define the gradient function

calculate_x3pcw_gradient <- function(data) {

  valid_data <- data |>
    dplyr::filter(
      is.finite(normalized_position),
      is.finite(
        x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(
      normalized_position
    )

  n_valid <- nrow(
    valid_data
  )

  if (n_valid < 2L) {
    return(
      tibble::tibble(
        n_valid_x3pcw_gradient_pairs = n_valid,
        x3pcw_topic_continuity_first = NA_real_,
        x3pcw_topic_continuity_final = NA_real_,
        x3pcw_topic_continuity_change = NA_real_,
        x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity_gradient = NA_real_,
        x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_gradient_se = NA_real_,
        x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_gradient_r2 = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }

  gradient_model <- stats::lm(
    x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity ~
      normalized_position,
    data = valid_data
  )

  gradient_summary <- summary(
    gradient_model
  )

  tibble::tibble(
    n_valid_x3pcw_gradient_pairs = n_valid,
    x3pcw_topic_continuity_first =
      dplyr::first(
        valid_data$
          x3pcw_adjacent_paragraph_similarity
      ),
    x3pcw_topic_continuity_final =
      dplyr::last(
        valid_data$
```
